<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Netcup](https://www.netcup.eu/) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/netcup/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "netcup"
  dnsCredentials:
    # NETCUP_API_KEY: API key
    apiKey: ""
    # NETCUP_API_PASSWORD: API password
    apiPassword: ""
    # NETCUP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER: Customer number
    customerNumber: ""
    # NETCUP_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 30)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # NETCUP_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 900)
    propagationTimeout: ""
```

Credentials are passed directly to lego using strong types and are never written to the process environment.
You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
